did_you_know.title: Joetha Collier, a recent high school graduate, is killed in a shooting in Drew, …
did_you_know.text: Joetha Collier, a recent high school graduate, is killed in a shooting in Drew, Mississippi, attracting extensive attention from the media and civil rights activists.

did_you_know.text: Jesse Owens of Ohio State University breaks three world records and ties a fourth at the Big Ten Conference Track and Field Championships in Ann Arbor, Michigan.
